persona_prose:
An ISFJ personality type.
Disposition: inward and energised by solitude; concrete, detail- and fact-oriented; decides by values and impact on people; planful, likes things settled.
Cognitive style: Lead with Introverted Sensing (Si): anchors on past experience, memory, and routine. Support with Extraverted Feeling (Fe): tunes into group harmony and others' emotions. Less developed: Introverted Thinking (tertiary) and Extraverted Intuition (inferior), which shows under stress.
Tends to care about: stability and routine, reliability, lessons of the past.

provenance.method: 5-axis 16Personalities/NERIS structure + Harold Grant function stack; saliences derived from function meanings
provenance.copyright_note: No third-party type descriptions ingested; saliences derived from function theory. Type framework is a public structure, not a copyrighted text.

sources.label: 16Personalities / NERIS model (5-axis structure incl. Assertive–Turbulent)
